indicators.name: marble dining table
indicators.rationale: Marble table is not suitable for cooking due to its high maintenance and potential damage from heat and water.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs are not designed for cooking, as they lack ergonomic support and are not made of materials suitable for food preparation.

indicators.name: open shelves
indicators.rationale: Open shelves provide easy access to cooking utensils and ingredients, which is beneficial for daily cooking.

indicators.name: marble countertops
indicators.rationale: Marble countertops are durable and easy to clean, making them suitable for food preparation.

indicators.name: kitchen island
indicators.rationale: Kitchen island provides additional counter space for food preparation and can serve as a workspace for cooking.

indicators.name: lighting fixtures
indicators.rationale: Well-placed lighting fixtures ensure good visibility for cooking tasks.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for daily cooking. While it has some positive features like open shelves and marble countertops, the presence of a marble dining table and white chairs makes it less suitable for cooking. The kitchen island and lighting fixtures provide some support for daily cooking activities.
